endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/auditingPolicies
endpoints.description: Lists a server's table auditing policies. Table auditing is deprecated, use blob auditing instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/auditingPolicies/{tableAuditingPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Gets a server's table auditing policy. Table auditing is deprecated, use blob auditing instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TABLEAUDITINGPOLICYNAME}} with a real tableauditingpolicyname. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/auditingPolicies/{tableAuditingPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a server's table auditing policy. Table auditing is deprecated, use blob auditing instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{TABLEAUDITINGPOLICYNAME}} with a real tableauditingpolicyname. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.description: Lists a database's table auditing policies. Table auditing is deprecated, use blob auditing instead.

endpoints.description: Gets a database's table auditing policy. Table auditing is deprecated, use blob auditing instead.

Replace {{TABLEAUDITINGPOLICYNAME}} with a real tableauditingpolicyname. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/databases/{databaseName}/auditingPolicies/{tableAuditingPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a database's table auditing policy. Table auditing is deprecated, use blob auditing instead.

Replace {{TABLEAUDITINGPOLICYNAME}} with a real tableauditingpolicyname. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/databases/{databaseName}/connectionPolicies/{connectionPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Gets a database's connection policy, which is used with table auditing. Table auditing is deprecated, use blob auditing instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename. Replace {{CONNECTIONPOLICYNAME}} with a real connectionpolicyname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/databases/{databaseName}/connectionPolicies/{connectionPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a database's connection policy, which is used with table auditing. Table auditing is deprecated, use blob auditing instead.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername.
